action.reasoning: Observation: Latest val peak 0.7589 but test AUC 0.75805 (still below overall best 0.7583 from iter17 with e=320/h=896/d=0.55/lr~1.2e-4). Strong early gains then overfitting despite ES; ~3min left (2 iters, ~70s each). Analysis: Embedded LSTM-DKT is effective (interaction embeds + per-skill FC + masking + clip/ES/scheduler); best params balance capacity/rep/reg well - higher e/h raised val but widened gen gap. Workspace train.py truncated but ran fully (no verbose bug). Decision: Fully rewrite all 3 files clean+complete (full hparam ckpt save w/ all keys, no deprecated args, robust ES/clip/scheduler/jsonl-only-logging, local /tmp val predict validation before submit, arg parsing, exact inference); tune close to best (e=320/h=896/d=0.55/lr=1.2e-4/wd=1.5e-4/bs=32/epochs=60/es_pat=15/sch_pat=5) for potential new peak. Run train+validate then submit_eval on best_model.pt.
